title: Look up Oakland PD response times

log.context: Look up Oakland PD response times

Posted. Here's a summary of what was found and sent:

**Oakland PD Response Times (2023–2025):**

- **Priority 1** (imminent threat): Median 9 min (per Oct 2025 City Auditor report), but 2023 monthly averages swung from 12 min to over 62 min
- **Priority 2** (urgent): 2.5–11 hours in 2023; East Oakland gets up to 2 hrs slower than western neighborhoods
- **Priority 3** (no threat): 6–20 hours in 2023
- **911 answer time**: ~35 sec avg as of early 2025, improved from ~55 sec in 2023 — still faili...(truncated)
